prompts:
from the competition -fish

Two things to do:

1. Fix the scrapers the lazy way — skip Playwright, just find the API endpoints those sites use. Give CodeFish this:

Prompt 6 — Find the AJAX endpoints:

For the 3 broken comp scrapers, I need you to find their actual data endpoints. Use Playwright to intercept network requests, not render the DOM.

Run this for each site:

cd ~/compfish && ./venv/bin/python3 -c "
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
p = sync_playwright().start()
b = p.chromium.launch()
page = b.new_page()

api_calls = []
def capture(route):
    url = route.request.url
    if any(x in url for x in ['.js', '.css', '.png', '.jpg', '.gif', '.svg', '.woff', 'google', 'facebook', 'analytics']):
        route.continue_()
        return
    api_calls.append({'url': url, 'method': route.request.method})
    route.continue_()

page.route('**/*', capture)
page.goto('https://www.competitionsguide.com.au/win-cars/', wait_until='networkidle')
page.wait_for_timeout(5000)
b.close()
p.stop()

for c in api_calls:
    print(f\"{c['method']} {c['url']}\")
"

Run for all 3 URLs:
- https://www.competitionsguide.com.au/win-cars/
- https://netrewards.com.au/competitions-category/online-free-entry/
- https://www.competitioncloud.com.au

Show me ALL the URLs captured for each. I'm looking for JSON/API endpoints that return the comp data.

2. Start the form-filler for the 94 we already have. That's the actual value. Give CodeFish this:

Prompt 7 — Build the entry engine (Phase 1 — recon):

We have 94 competitions in ~/compfish/compfish.db ready to enter. Before building auto-fill, I need to understand what the entry forms look like.

Pick the top 5 comps by prize value from the database:

cd ~/compfish && ./venv/bin/python3 -c "
from compfish_db import get_enterable_comps
for c in get_enterable_comps(5):
    print(f\"ID:{c['id']} | \${c['prize_value_aud']:,.0f} | {c['title'][:60]}\")
    print(f\"  URL: {c['entry_url']}\")
    print()
"

Then for each of those 5 URLs, use Playwright to:
1. Navigate to the entry URL
2. Take a screenshot (save to ~/compfish/screenshots/)
3. List all form fields found (input, select, textarea elements)
4. Note if there's a CAPTCHA or social login required

Report back with:
- Which ones have simple HTML forms (name/email/phone fields)
- Which ones need social login or CAPTCHA
- Which ones redirect to external platforms (Gleam, Shortstack, etc)

Prompt 6 finds the hidden APIs. Prompt 7 tells us which comps Fish can actually auto-enter vs which need manual. Both can run in parallel.
